title: Asia-Pacific markets mostly fall as renewed U.S.-Iran clashes keep investors on edge
summary_full: Asia stocks broadly traded lower Friday, as concerns grew over renewed hostilities between Iran and the U.S. amid a fragile ceasefire.
summary_public: Asia stocks broadly traded lower Friday, as concerns grew over renewed hostilities between Iran and the U.S. amid a fragile ceasefire.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: renewed U.S.-Iran clashes keep investors on edge
